metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4007
metadata.comment:
Rationale: While the evidence is weak, immunofluorescence staining of SCRN1 using rabbit anti-SCRN1 (Sigma, HPA024517, RRID:AB_2184811) shows presynaptic localization of SCRN1 by co-localization with vGlut1 (presynaptic marker). The antibody is validated in supplementary Fig EV1I and EV1J where neuronal staining of SCRN1 is reduced in neurons expressing an shRNA against SCRN1. EV1H displays that the antibody used for SCRN1 is specific and does not cross-react with other isoforms.

In addition, human SCRN1a was fused to GFP and expressed in rat primary hippocampal neurons. Presynaptic co-localization of SCRN1-GFP and Syt1 staining is observed and shown in figure EV1 F. The presynaptic phenotype in SCRN1 knockdown neurons was rescued by expressing wild-type GFP-SCRN1, indicating that SCRN1-GFP construct retains its function despite the GFP tagging.

11/01/2021 Dnyanada:
The co-localisation of SCRN1 with the presynaptic marker Syt1 (Figure 1I) should be considered with scepticism as the experiment does not include a negative control (post-synaptic marker) to indicate an exclusive presynaptic localization.
The paper also shows that GFP-SCRN1 colocalises with the ER luminal marker TagRFP-ER in hippocampal neurons (Figure 2) indicating its localisation in the presynaptic SER. However, the generic term "presynapse" was chosen as it is based on overexpression of the gene and fails to represent its endogenous location.. Experimental description: Dissociated hippocampal and cortical neuron cultures were prepared from embryonic day 18 rat pups of mixed gender.
